flow_points: South Africa started strong, scoring 66 runs for 0 wickets in the Powerplay with an 11.0 RR.
In contrast, Canada struggled early, losing 4 wickets for 50 runs in their Powerplay.
Canada's bowlers Jaskaran Singh (economy 12.25) and Ansh Patel (economy 7.75) had expensive outings.
South Africa sustained momentum, finishing with a high-scoring Death Overs phase at a 12.4 RR.
AK Markram anchored South Africa's innings, contributing 27.7% of their total runs.
In the chase, NS Dhaliwal anchored Canada's innings with 64 runs off 52 balls, scoring 41% of their total.
L Ngidi delivered a crucial spell for South Africa, taking 4 wickets for 31 runs.
Ansh Patel also delivered a crucial spell for Canada, securing 3 wickets for 31 runs.
Canada struggled under extreme chase pressure (Index: 84.0), leading to a late-innings collapse.
South Africa secured a commanding 57-run victory.
